LandingPage.hero_title_1: Your schedule fully booked and organized
LandingPage.hero_subtitle: Simplify appointment scheduling. Let your clients choose, book, and confirm without exchanging a single message.
LandingPage.features_subtitle: An automatic and smart flow that works for you 24/7.
LandingPage.feature_1_desc: Promote your exclusive page on Instagram, WhatsApp, or wherever you prefer. The link is just yours.
LandingPage.feature_2_desc: No endless message threading. Your client accesses, sees available slots, and books instantly.
LandingPage.feature_3_desc: The slot is blocked automatically. The appointment goes straight into your calendar, confirming the reservation.
LandingPage.feature_4_desc: You track your entire team, client history, and real-time revenue with clean reports in the panel
LandingPage.testimonials_subtitle: Professionals who revolutionized how they manage their businesses.
LandingPage.pricing_subtitle: Start for free. Scale when you grow.
LandingPage.pricing_pro_desc: For those who really want to grow
LandingPage.feature_item_catalog_desc: Add value by showcasing your services
